NAVAREA XIX 94/17
SEISMIC SURVEY FROM 23 AUG TO 15 OCT BY WG COLUMBUS
VESSEL IS TOWING 1X8000 METER LONG CABLE IN AREA B0UNDED BY.
A. 74-32.0N 020-50.0E
B. 74-16.0N 023-15.0E
C. 74-07.0N 029-12.0E
D. 74-12.0N 031-20.0E
E. 74-30.0N 035-49.0E
F. 76-00.0N 028-07.0E
G. 76-20.0N 025-25.0E
H. 76-16.0N 024-53.0E
I.  76-09.0N 024-45.0E
J.  75-40.0N 022-07.0E

VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 6 NM
GUARD VESSEL STORM VEST IN ATTENDANCE
